heading: Cooperative agreements
label: 1540 Cooperative agreements
notes: Cooperative Agreements for Research, Education, Training, and Outreach, , , provided in part:Pub. L. 108–199, div. B, title II118 Stat. 71Jan. 23, 2004“That, hereafter, the Secretary of Commerce may enter into cooperative agreements with the Joint and Cooperative Institutes as designated by the Secretary to use the personnel, services, or facilities of such organizations for research, education, training, and outreach”.Similar provisions were contained in , , .Pub.
